# AXIS — Production Files

This directory contains production-ready assets generated from the source files.

## CSS

`main.min.css` is automatically generated by the Live Sass Compiler on every save.
No manual step required — just run **Watch Sass** in VS Code.

To configure the output path and format, see `.vscode/settings.json` at the project root.

## JavaScript

`script.min.js` should be manually minified from `/src/js/script.js` before deploying.

Recommended tools:
- [Terser](https://terser.org) (CLI or online)
- [Toptal JS Minifier](https://www.toptal.com/developers/javascript-minifier)

## Switching to production in `index.html`

Comment out the development links and uncomment the production ones:

```html
<!-- STYLES -->
<!-- <link rel="stylesheet" href="/src/css/main.css" /> -->
<link rel="stylesheet" href="/dist/main.min.css" />

<!-- SCRIPTS -->
<!-- <script src="/src/js/script.js" defer></script> -->
<script src="/dist/script.min.js" defer></script>
```
